minimum_evidence: scheme order boundary legal schedule and legal GIS reconciliation signed off
required_control: Stage 10A component register boundary schedule and clause matrix
required_reviewer: Legal Review Agent and GIS/Data Review Agent
pass_condition: scheme order and boundary have legal sign-off

minimum_evidence: lawful consultation launch response analysis conscientious consideration and reconsultation assessment
required_control: Stage 8A consultation controls and consultation statement
required_reviewer: Consultation Review Agent and Legal Review Agent
pass_condition: consultation is lawful and conscientiously addressed

minimum_evidence: current statutory confirmation route dossier contents and DfT expectations satisfied
required_reviewer: Legal Review Agent and DfT Process Simulation Agent
pass_condition: current statutory confirmation requirements are satisfied

minimum_evidence: Section 151 affordability review budgets costs revenue downside and net-proceeds plans
required_control: financial case net-proceeds controls and finance review
required_reviewer: Finance Review Agent and Section 151 Simulation Agent

minimum_evidence: lawful procurement route market evidence contracts ICT performance exit and risk allocation
required_control: commercial case and procurement legal review
required_reviewer: Commercial Review Agent and Procurement Law Agent
pass_condition: procurement and commercial route is lawful and credible

minimum_evidence: DPIA lawful basis privacy cyber retention records and service data controls
required_control: data protection and cyber assurance pack
required_reviewer: Data Protection Review Agent and Cyber Review Agent
pass_condition: data protection and cyber controls are ready

minimum_evidence: licensing account management billing enforcement appeals recovery staffing testing and shadow year readiness
independent review of parking inventory charge-base demand revenue uncertainty and downside cases
required_control: model cards run manifests ASR ASST and revenue assurance
required_reviewer: TAG/Appraisal Review Agent and Finance Review Agent
pass_condition: charge-base and revenue models are independently reviewed

minimum_evidence: deliverable funded transport programme benefits dependencies owners and net-proceeds linkage
required_control: investment programme funding assurance and benefits controls
required_reviewer: Funding Assurance Agent and Strategic Case Review Agent

minimum_evidence: EqIA human-rights distributional assessment mitigations funding owners and monitoring
required_reviewer: Equality Review Agent and Finance Review Agent
pass_condition: equality mitigations are funded and owned

minimum_evidence: DfT issues responses dispositions and accepted submission risks
required_control: DfT engagement log and statutory dossier responses
required_reviewer: DfT Process Simulation Agent and Legal Review Agent
pass_condition: DfT engagement issues are closed or accepted as submission risks

minimum_evidence: WECA/MCA role consent no-role consultation response funding and assurance dependencies
required_control: WECA/MCA role classifier and package funding assurance controls
required_reviewer: WECA Governance Agent and Funding Assurance Agent

minimum_evidence: decision-makers see open issues residual risks downside cases and no-go disposition
required_reviewer: Simulation Gate Authority and Red Team
pass_condition: no P0 findings remain and decision-makers see residual risks and downside
